section.heading: Sense of Congress concerning use of steel manufactured in North America and negotiation of a project labor agreement
section.chapeau: It is the sense of Congress that—

paragraph.content: an Alaska natural gas transportation project would provide significant economic benefits to the United States and Canada; and

paragraph.chapeau: to maximize those benefits, the sponsors of the Alaska natural gas transportation project should make every effort to—

subparagraph.content: use steel that is manufactured in North America; and
negotiate a project labor agreement to expedite construction of the pipeline.
